---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Cmd+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggseg)
library(ggplot2)
library(corrplot)
library(dplyr)
library(emmeans)
library(sjPlot)  # For extracting confidence intervals
library(ggeffects)
library(optimx)
library(ggsegGlasser)
library(stringr)

```

# encoding 

## data to load
```{r}
results <- read_csv("glasser_plot_viewing_df.csv")
```

## plot
```{r}
library(scico)
library(scales)
max_abs <- max(abs(glasser_plot_df$term_tvalue), na.rm = TRUE)
#max_abs<-3
bold_palette <- c("cyan", "blue", "black", "red", "yellow")

p<-ggplot(glasser_plot_df) +
  geom_brain(
    atlas = glasser,
    aes(fill = term_tvalue ),
    colour = "black",
    size = 0.2,
    position = position_brain(side ~ hemi)
  )+
  #geom_sf(aes(fill = term_tvalue), lwd = 0.1, color = 'black') +
    scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = bold_palette,
    values = rescale(c(-max_abs, -max_abs/3, 0, max_abs/3, max_abs)),
    limits = c(-max_abs, max_abs)# adjust to your data range
  )+
  #scale_fill_scico(
  #  palette = "vikO",   # diverging, perceptually uniform
  #  direction = 1,
  #  limits = c(-max_abs, max_abs),
  #  midpoint = 0,
  #  na.value = "grey"
  #) +
  coord_sf() +
  theme_void()
ggsave('glasser_viewing_v2.png', plot = p, width = 4, height = 2, dpi = 300)
```

## permutation tests and plot
## data to load
```{r}
glasser_plot_df_unique <- read_csv("glasser_viewing_df_unique.csv")
```
## run permutatio test
```{r}
set.seed(123)

df <- glasser_plot_df_unique

# observed statistic
obs_diff <- with(df,
  mean(mean_beta[community_name == "DMN"], na.rm = TRUE) -
  mean(mean_beta[community_name != "DMN"], na.rm = TRUE)
)

# permutation test
n_perm <- 10000
perm_diffs <- replicate(n_perm, {
  perm_labels <- sample(df$community_name)
  mean(df$mean_beta[perm_labels == "DMN"], na.rm = TRUE) -
    mean(df$mean_beta[perm_labels != "DMN"], na.rm = TRUE)
})

p_empirical <- mean(perm_diffs >= obs_diff)

obs_diff
p_empirical

```


## plot permutation results
```{r}

# Put permutation results into a data frame
perm_df <- data.frame(perm_diffs = perm_diffs)

p<-ggplot(perm_df, aes(x = perm_diffs)) +
  geom_histogram(
    bins = 100,
    fill = "grey30",
    color = "grey30"
  ) +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = obs_diff,
    color = "red",
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "DMN slopes vs. rest of the brain",
    x = "Permuted Mean Difference",
    y = "Frequency"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18)

p <- p +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = Inf,
    y = Inf,
    label = paste0("p = ", signif(p_empirical, 3)),
    hjust = 1.05,
    vjust = 1.5,
    size = 6
  )

p <- p +
  theme(
    plot.margin = margin(10, 20, 10, 10)
  )


ggsave(
  filename = "permutation_null_distribution_viewing.png",
  plot = p,
  width = 6,
  height = 4,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

```

# recall

## data to load
```{r}
results <- read_csv("glasser_recall_plot_df.csv")
```
## plot
```{r}
library(scico)
max_abs <- max(abs(glasser_recall_plot_df$term_tvalue), na.rm = TRUE)


library(scales)  # for rescale()

# Example custom BOLD-style palette
bold_palette <- c("cyan", "blue", "black", "red", "yellow")

p<-ggplot(glasser_recall_plot_df) +
  geom_brain(
    atlas = glasser,
    aes(fill = term_tvalue),
    colour = "black",
    size = 0.2,
    position = position_brain(side ~ hemi)
  )+
  #geom_sf(aes(fill = term_tvalue), lwd = 0.2, color = 'black') +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = bold_palette,
    values = rescale(c(-max_abs, -max_abs/3, 0, max_abs/3, max_abs)),
    limits = c(-max_abs, max_abs)# adjust to your data range
  ) +
  #facet_wrap(~hemi, ncol = 1,nrow=2)+
  
  #scale_fill_scico(
  #  palette = "vikO",   # diverging, perceptually uniform
  #  direction = 1,
  #  limits = c(-max_abs, max_abs),
  #  midpoint = 0,
  #  na.value = "gray"
  #) +
  coord_sf() +
  theme_void()
#Error in match.arg(palette, scico_palette_names(categorical)) :
#'arg' should be one of “acton”, “bam”, “bamako”, “bamO”, “batlow”, “batlowK”, “batlowW”, “berlin”, “bilbao”, “broc”, “brocO”, “buda”, “bukavu”, “cork”, “corkO”, “davos”, “devon”, #“fes”, “glasgow”, “grayC”, “hawaii”, “imola”, “lajolla”, “lapaz”, “lipari”, “lisbon”, “managua”, “navia”, “nuuk”, “oleron”, “oslo”, “roma”, “romaO”, “tofino”, “tokyo”, “turku”, #“vanimo”, “vik”, “vikO”
ggsave('glasser_recall2.png', plot = p, width = 4, height = 2, dpi = 300)
```

## data to load
```{r}
glasser_recall_plot_df_unique <- read_csv("glasser_recall_df_unique.csv")
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)

df <- glasser_recall_plot_df_unique

# observed statistic
obs_diff <- with(df,
  mean(mean_beta[community_name == "DMN"], na.rm = TRUE) -
  mean(mean_beta[community_name != "DMN"], na.rm = TRUE)
)

# permutation test
n_perm <- 10000
perm_diffs <- replicate(n_perm, {
  perm_labels <- sample(df$community_name)
  mean(df$mean_beta[perm_labels == "DMN"], na.rm = TRUE) -
    mean(df$mean_beta[perm_labels != "DMN"], na.rm = TRUE)
})

p_empirical <- mean(perm_diffs >= obs_diff)

obs_diff
p_empirical

```

```{r}

# Put permutation results into a data frame
perm_df <- data.frame(perm_diffs = perm_diffs)

p<-ggplot(perm_df, aes(x = perm_diffs)) +
  geom_histogram(
    bins = 100,
    fill = "grey30",
    color = "grey30"
  ) +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = obs_diff,
    color = "red",
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "DMN slopes vs. rest of the brain",
    x = "Permuted Mean Difference",
    y = "Frequency"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18)


p <- p +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = Inf,
    y = Inf,
    label = paste0("p = ", signif(p_empirical, 3)),
    hjust = 1.05,
    vjust = 1.5,
    size = 6
  )



p <- p +
  theme(
    plot.margin = margin(10, 20, 10, 10)
  )


ggsave(
  filename = "permutation_null_distribution_recall.png",
  plot = p,
  width = 6,
  height = 4,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

```
